attributes.description: Alerts when datacenter hosts are in `off` or `standby` power state. Usually hardware failure or unplanned maintenance.
attributes.name: [vSphere OTel] Host power state unhealthy

investigation_guide.blob:
## vSphere host power state unhealthy

### What fired
Host count with `power_state in (off, standby)` exceeded 0.

### Why it matters
Unplanned host power-off reduces cluster capacity; ongoing standby indicates scheduled maintenance or DPM.

### Triage
1. Check maintenance windows.
2. Inspect hardware alerts (HW sensors).

### Remediation
- Recover or replace the host.

### Tuning
- Fires on any off/standby host.
